name: mcporter
description: Use the mcporter CLI to list, configure, auth, and call MCP servers/tools directly (HTTP or stdio), including ad-hoc servers, config edits, and CLI/type generation.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 mcporter 相關工作
幫我啟用 mcporter 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 mcporter

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the mcporter skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
